About Partha Dental South India’s Largest Dental Chain Partha Dental – South India’s largest dental chain with 120+ clinics, 300+ expert doctors, and 15 lakh+ happy patients across Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, and Tamil Nadu. We have a team of qualified dentists with over 28 years of experience. Our highly experienced dentists focus on providing high-quality care in a friendly and comfortable setting. We offer a wide range of dental services, from general check-ups to advanced cosmetic and orthodontic treatments. With state-of-the-art technology and patient-centric care, we ensure every smile is healthy and confident. 0+ States 0+ Clinics 0+ Experience 0+ Patients States 0 + Clinics 0 + Experience 0 + Patients 0 + Frequently Asked Questions 1. Do You Have a Pediatric Dentist at Partha Dental? Yes. Pediatric Dentists are available on appointment at Partha Dental Clinics. We offer comprehensive dental solutions tailored for children, including preventive care and early intervention. 2. How do I book an appointment with Partha Dental? You can schedule your appointment online at parthadental.com/make-an-appointment , or reach us by calling 801 955 0000 or via WhatsApp at 8500779000 for quick assistance. 3. What dental services does Partha Dental offer? Partha Dental offers a comprehensive range of the best dental treatments in Hyderabad, including Invisalign Aligners, Dental Implants, Partha Aligners (Clear Aligners), Kids Dentistry (Pediatric Dental Care), Smile Designing and Cosmetic Dentistry, Root Canal Treatment (RCT), Laser Dentistry, Dental Crowns and Bridges, Full and Partial Dentures, Metal and Ceramic Braces, Invisible Braces, Teeth Whitening, and Tooth Decay/Cavity Treatments. 4. What are Partha Dental clinic timings? All Partha Dental clinics operate 7 days a week, from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM, ensuring convenient access for all patients. 5. What modes of payment are acceptable at Partha Dental? We accept cash, credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, and provide easy EMI options on selected dental treatments. 6. What safety measures are in place at Partha Dental? Partha Dental adheres to the highest standards of clinical safety, including: Advanced dental disinfection protocols Class B autoclave sterilization Use of disposable dental kits and PPE HEPA air purification systems Regular sanitization of treatment areas Contactless check-in and digital records management Your safety is our top priority at every stage of your visit. 7.Do You Have Imaging (X-Rays, CT-SCAN) Facilities? Yes. We do have OPG X-Rays, Digital RVG , Intraoral Scanners (Aligners) and 3D CBCT. 8. How do I reschedule my appointment? To reschedule an appointment, please call us at 801 955 0000 or message us on WhatsApp at 8500779000 .
